title: 2 Storage Stocks That Offer Cyclical Value
text: Hard drives and flash memory are two types of storage that are essential parts of any computing system. This includes everything from your personal computer to huge cloud data centers.

title: How 2 Chip Companies, Western Digital and Kioxia, Are Shaking Up the Memory Market
text: The memory market is in one of its worst downturns, pushing two top players into merger discussions.

title: As AI Evolves, Which Stocks Make Sense? Kirk Spano With Ramy Taraboulsi
text: AI's major bottleneck is a lack of computing power, with supercomputers needed for the training and testing of data. The amount of AI networks created and tested is set to increase exponentially over the next six years, with the computing power improving 250,000 times.

title: Western Digital (WDC) Announces New Sustainability Goals
text: Western Digital's (WDC) new goals focus on powering its entire operations using solely renewable energy sources by 2030.

title: Western Digital (WDC) Up 17.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Western Digital (WDC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Western Digital Sets New Corporate Sustainability Targets and Commits to Net Zero Emissions by 2032
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: WDC) today announced ambitious new corporate sustainability targets that extend the company's core commitment to positively impacting its global environmental footprint. The new targets focus on powering the company's operations with 100% renewable energy, achieving net zero Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions across the company's operations, as well as water and waste reduction targets. Sustainability strategies are core to Western Di.
